Uses of Package
jline.lang.layered

  • Packages that use jline.lang.layered 
    Package Description
    jline.examples
    This package contains several example models
    jline.lang.layered
    This package contains the classes used the specify LayeredNetwork objects
    jline.solvers.ln
    Classes that define LINE's Layered Network (LN) solver
  • Classes in jline.lang.layered used by jline.examples 
    Class Description
    LayeredNetwork
    A layered queueing network model
  • Classes in jline.lang.layered used by jline.lang.layered 
    Class Description
    Activity
    An element modeling an individual service activity
    ActivityPrecedence
    A class modeling precedence relationships among activities
    Entry
    Service exposed by a Task object
    Host
    A processor that can run Tasks
    LayeredNetwork
    A layered queueing network model
    LayeredNetworkElement
    Element of a LayeredNetwork model
    LayeredNetworkStruct
    Class summarizing the characteristics of a LayeredNetwork
    Processor
    Alias for the Host class, i.e., a processor that can run Tasks
    Task
    A LayeredNetwork entity that can host services specified in the form of Entry objects and that runs on a Host
  • Classes in jline.lang.layered used by jline.solvers.ln 
    Class Description
    LayeredNetwork
    A layered queueing network model
    LayeredNetworkStruct
    Class summarizing the characteristics of a LayeredNetwork
